response.justification: Wei's current role in AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks at re:cinq directly aligns with the job's technical focus, and staff-level experience demonstrates required seniority. However, the documented AI experience spans only ~13 months, falling far short of the "8+ years building production-grade AI solutions" requirement. Significant gaps include no listed Python experience (explicitly required), and no demonstrated knowledge of vector databases or RAG architectures. Warrants clarification on prior AI work and core technical stack before proceeding.
strengths: Current role directly focused on AI-agent infrastructure, MCP code generators, and agentic workflow frameworks—exact technical foundation the role needs
Staff-level engineer with proven technical leadership across 17+ years; organized workshops, gave conference talks, and contributed to open-source projects
Full-stack TypeScript/Node.js expertise with AWS cloud platform experience and proven ability to work across multiple languages as needed
concerns: Documented AI/ML experience is ~13 months old (April 2025–present); does not satisfy the "minimum 8 years building and shipping production-grade AI solutions" requirement
Python is not listed in skills section despite being explicitly required for the role; primary languages are TypeScript and D, with no indication of Python proficiency
No mentioned experience with vector databases, RAG architectures, or LLM performance metrics—all specified required qualifications
